[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0010001 2
1 1000110 3
2 0000000 a
3 0010011 3
4 1001111 5
5 1000001 2
6 1111111 a
7 1111111 a

01 1110111 6

23 1111110 6
34 0000111 3

70 1111110 6
